contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/object_class/count.md
contract.description: Counts distinct object class entries for the requested agency toptier code and fiscal year, defaulting to the latest loaded year when the query omits fiscal_year.

toptier_code.description: Agency toptier identifier supplied in the URL path (CGAC or FREC).
toptier_code.constraints: Required; must be a 3- or 4-digit numeric code. Known codes return JSON. Numeric-but-unknown codes return JSON 404 with detail. Non-numeric or wrong-length segments miss the route and respond with HTML 404.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; omitting it or sending an empty string defaults to the current fiscal year (FY2026 at capture time). Must parse as an integer between 2008 and 2026 inclusive. Non-integer inputs (including a single space) return 400 with a type validation message. Outside-range integers return 422 with explicit min/max detail.

object_class_count.description: Number of object class records for the agency and fiscal year; observed non-negative.

messages.description: Array of warning strings; observed empty or containing the DATA Act availability notice for pre-FY2017 years.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

body.detail: Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. ' ' is not a valid type (integer)

quirks: Fiscal years before FY2017 return object_class_count 0 plus the DATA Act availability notice in messages.
Supplying fiscal_year as an empty string defaults to the current fiscal year, but a single space character fails validation with 400.
Fiscal_year bounds are enforced with 422 errors citing the observed minimum and maximum (2008-2026 at capture time).
Non-numeric or misformed toptier_code path segments fall through routing and yield HTML 404 responses.
risks: Clients must handle both 400 and 422 validation failures surfaced in the detail field.
HTML 404 responses for malformed toptier_code values can break JSON parsers if not guarded against.
Fiscal year bounds shift annually; outdated integrations may see 422 errors after year turnover until they update the allowed range.
gaps: Only observed a single warning string in messages; other message formats or multiple entries remain unverified.

probes.notes: pass - Omitting fiscal_year defaulted to FY2026 and returned the expected schema.
pass - Explicit fiscal_year override worked and preserved the response shape.
pass - Verified a four-digit FREC toptier code returns JSON and defaults to FY2026.

probes.notes: pass - Pre-FY2017 request returns zero count plus the DATA Act warning.
pass - Future fiscal_year rejected with explicit max bound.

risks: Clients must handle both 400 and 422 validation failures surfaced in the detail field.
HTML 404 responses for malformed toptier_code values can break JSON parsers if not guarded against.
Fiscal year bounds shift annually; outdated integrations may see 422 errors after year turnover until they update the allowed range.
